name: Conventional Fire Alarm Panel — 4 Zone
shortDescription: Four-zone control panel with battery backup and fault monitoring.
longDescription: The control panel is the heart of a conventional detection system, monitoring each zone circuit for alarm and fault conditions and driving the sounders. This four-zone panel includes integral battery backup for standby operation during mains failure, plus zone-level indication so responders know where to go.

images.alt: Conventional Fire Alarm Panel — 4 Zone supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
